rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers in AGREE annexes by ensuring all referenced features or helpers are visible or properly declared in the same annex.
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annex expressions to avoid type errors.
Ensure that assumptions and guarantees reference concrete bounds or named constants when defining ranges.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must declare helper functions or variables in the same scope before use.
Component type contracts should define input envelopes and output ranges using visible feature names.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing identifiers that are not visible or declared in the same AGREE annex.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
